The '''''Thor''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ship was part of a convoy along with the ''[[Zeus]]'' and the ''[[Odysseus]]''. The convoy was attacked by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]], and the starships had to rely on [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue]] squadrons to give the starships enough time to escape into hyperspace.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on which side the player takes.
